title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Verify account deletion flow in App Settings: confirmation dialog appears, cancel keeps user logged in on Cloud, confirm logs user out and removes account.
steps: Click Cancel on the confirmation dialog
Verify the user stays logged in
Verify the user remains on Cloud
Click Confirm on the confirmation dialog
Verify an 'Account Deleted' popup appears briefly
Verify the user is logged out
Verify the user is removed from Cloud
expected: User can successfully delete their account. Cancel closes the dialog without logging out or removing the user from Cloud. Confirm closes the dialog, shows a spinner, briefly displays an "Account Deleted" popup, logs the user out, and removes the user from Cloud.
